token.limit: Sorry, the AI token limit has been reached for this minute. I need a short break, please try again in a minute! 😥

not.found: Oops, the AI asked me to run a command I don't recognize. >,<

command.error: Oops, something went wrong when I tried to run the command. >,<

messageCreate.error: Oops, I'm feeling dizzy right now. Please try again later! ><
messageCreate.mention: Hey, what do you want to say? >,<

translate.limit: Sorry, the AI token limit has been reached for this minute. I need a short break, please try again in a minute! 😥
translate.error: ❌ An error occurred while translating the text. Please try again later! ><

already.enabled: 🤖 AI is already enabled in this channel! You can start chatting with the AI here.

enable.success: ✅ AI has been enabled in this channel! Feel free to start chatting with the AI 🎉

not.enabled: ❌ AI is not enabled in this channel. Nothing to disable.

disable.success: 🛑 AI has been disabled in this channel. See you again!

unknown.subcommand: ❌ Unknown subcommand. Use `/ai enable` or `/ai disable`.

list.empty: 🤖 There are no AI-enabled channels in this server yet.
list.title: AI-Enabled Channels

your.interaction: ❌ This is not your interaction! Use the command yourself to view the AI channel list.
